name: Tara Puckett
body: To be honest, I chose not to read this post when you initially posted based off the title. I just wasn’t ready to hear more bad news for sweet Lyla. However, curiosity got the best of me and I gave it another try tonight. I always appreciate your raw truth. You guys are the most kind and loving family and Lyla is so lucky you guys are trying every avenue for her. Praying daily for you guys and some good news!

name: Betsy Musick
body: Praying for Lyla and your family continuously!

name: Ashley Phillips
body: Gracious. 😮‍💨 tears and prayers for better days. Love you all.

name: Natalie Rynard
body: Much love to you, Kayla and the kids. Many prayers being sent up 🙏🏻

name: Mills Nicole
body: Continue to pray for you all, believe me sometimes I question him too; and then I remind myself that he doesn't give me no more than he knows that I can handle, enough though it seems like a lot at times. Safe travels in the near future.

name: Joni Stierhoff
body: My prayers are constant - love to all of you.
